I see a lot of tier list mix standard and Limited units which is bad/confusing to new players, so I'll seperate my own biased opinions here. 

I'm a player who beat the main story in 2 weeks after starting and constant 375+ dtide on the leaderboards. Everyone has their own opinion on tiers, but here's mine I'll post both Standard and Limited tier lists. 

As a new player you should be pulling on Acqueor banner over any other banner as, on average, their units are much better. Sure Chaos, Ultra, Caro has good standards, but they have some really bad ones as well. Note, all Limited characters get added to Standard after 1 year~ at .5% rate

In this I catagorized Standard/Limited.

Limited, in most cases are better than standard with the exception of a few on release (Sorel).

For Limited I split S tier into 2 sections. S tier meta defining damage carry and meta defining support carry. These units are good in most comps, HOWEVER, some Supports are not that great if you are a new player since you won't have any units for them to support well. A good case is G-Doll, which amps up counter, poison massively at e7 making her great and she exalts often. However you won't have the units need to supply her and for her to supply you. I might writeup a detail on each awaker and why later. But I just made this rq.
thread_title: Tier list for Standard and Limited separated 2.1

content:
Limited Writeup on why 

S Tiers - 

Tawil - My favorite unit and I think the most broken unit in the game, but I'm biased. Everyone would agree she is S tier and a staple. The reason why she is so strong is that she is a support... that does more damage than 95% of the awakers in the game. Her exalt lets her pick 3 cards from the realm you are playing and reduce it's cost turn by turn from ANY unit in the realm. Making her a flex pick. Her 6 Wing gives an easy access Barrier (negate 1 damge), 15% of boss hp gone, and a whole suite of utility. She is a swiss army knife in game, except every knife is a cleaver. 

G Helot - Most damaging Caro and probably unit turn 1. Everyone uses her for fast clears. 

Ryker - Controversial - Some argue he's only A, or B. However, thats the fun of him . His mechanic is gambling. When you crit, he reduces the cost of a card drawn, his card "showdown" can roll from 1-6. Technically, if you always roll 6s and crit every ability, roll 6 on his exalt. He is the strongest unit in game. If you think he's weak, just roll better. IIf you roll 1s, he might be one of the worst, besides Alva . 

Miryam - Goth Mommy - She is a poison support + Damage dealer and is very good at supplying aliemus to other units and giving temp crit and tentacles. Her rouse is one of the best in the game. She pairs well with G-Doll, tulu, anyone in aqua really and awakers that need aliemus while supplying power, tentacles, poison, etc.

Thais - Miryam's rival in the Mommy support catalogue . However, unlike Miryam, she is puresupport , but more general use than other supports. She gives lots of Str, can apply vuln/weak, and her exalt can copy a card 2 times of any unit and reduce their cost. Making her very good. She also generates ALOT of embryo fusion for Caro. 

Horla - Ultra - Strong as she is the only unit to allow you to keep cards +energy with joy

Hameln - Chaos - Support + Damage, his rouse is one of the best.

Out of space.
thread_title: Tier list for Standard and Limited separated 2.1

content:
Standard Writeup

Caecus - Provides healing, counter, defense, and damage. He heals more than most support healers. Her Exalt applies vuln and heals. 

Naut - Provides the most shields out of any unit in the game. Though counter stacking is to be desired, he pairs well with alot of comps. You can either pair her with counter units, or just slot her in any comp that needs defenses. She does no damage however.

Winkle - the Best Standard Ultra unit in the game... and the only one that is decent. Everyone else sucks unless put in niche comps. She is a counter +aliemus support. Pairs well with Wanda.

Tulu - Former Limited, now Standard, so you pull him at reduced rates. He generates alot of tentacles. And as a Former limited, he is strong.

Goliath - One of the stronger standard and used in a lot of comps as a flex pick . He can trivialize some bosses in D-tide and story as his unique 1 cost card allows you to steal ALL of the STR from ALL enemies for 1 turn. Some bosses stack str to the 1000s. This is handy as a survival tool and damage tool. In some later mob mechanics, the mob gain str when youdo x. Rather than not doing x, you can just purposefully empower them and then yank their power. Needs Aliemus regen

Ramona - Good in most comps due to her exalt. Plus she is a purple R unit so everyone has her. She is handy in practically 99% of comps while you are starting out. Eventually you will replace her for a more specialized comp, but she remains stronger than most units.

Aegis -Free vuln application and energy, + Petrify gives you breathing room for 1 turn in some comps. 

Sorel - Former Limited, now standard.
